text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey! Brian, do you have anything you want
to say to me today?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
(Patience, Maya. A grown-up doesn't make a fuss
of their birthday. Ugh... but...)

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
One step closer to being a grown-up, and this is what I
get?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text:
...That reminds me, isn't today... your birthday? I
don't have anything to give you, but...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
...!
Y-yeah! That's right! So you did remember, Brian.
I'm so happy!
